title: Why GaN is Reshaping Power Electronics in 2026
excerpt: Gallium Nitride is unlocking smaller, cooler, faster power stages — here's what PCB designers need to know about layout, thermal management, and choosing GaN drivers.

title: From Wizard to Freeform: Choosing the Right Footprint Workflow
excerpt: A practical comparison of guided footprint builders versus full freeform editors, with real-world examples from QFN to BGA packages.

title: HASL vs ENIG vs OSP: Picking the Right Surface Finish
excerpt: Surface finish affects solderability, shelf life and cost. We break down the trade-offs for prototype and production runs.

title: Getting Started: Your First PCB Footprint in Chipkraft
excerpt: Step-by-step guide to creating your first IPC-standard footprint using the Wizard Builder — from pin count to exported KiCad file.

title: Understanding Gerber Files: What You Need to Send to Your Fab
excerpt: A complete breakdown of the Gerber file set — copper layers, drill files, board outline, solder mask, and silkscreen — and how to export them correctly.

title: BGA vs QFN: Package Selection for High-Frequency Designs
excerpt: Ball grid array vs quad flat no-lead — thermal, signal integrity, and assembly trade-offs explained for RF and high-speed digital design.
